scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/schemas/repository/v1 dist/schemas/semantic/v1 dist/schemas/ci/v1 && cp ../../contracts/repository/v1/*.json dist/schemas/repository/v1/ && cp ../../contracts/semantic/v1/*.json dist/schemas/semantic/v1/ && cp ../../contracts/ci/v1/*.json dist/schemas/ci/v1/
